f . is_empty ()) ; let budget_ok = decode . iteration_budget . is_some_and (| b | b >= 1) ; if ! factors_ok || ! budget_ok { return Err (WfError :: MalformedReconstruction) ; } if bound . basis . strength () . rank () < GuaranteeStrength :: Empirical . rank () { return Err (WfError :: MalformedReconstruction) ; } if let Some (t) = decode . cleanup_threshold { if ! (0.0 ..= 1.0) . contains (& t) { return Err (WfError :: MalformedReconstruction) ; } } if let Some (beta) = decode . beta { if ! beta . is_finite () || beta <= 0.0 { return Err (WfError :: MalformedReconstruction) ; } } if let Some (tau) = decode . tau_lock { if ! (0.0 ..= 1.0) . contains (& tau) { return Err (WfError :: MalformedReconstruction) ; } } } } if ! bound . well_formed () { return Err (WfError :: MalformedBound) ; } Ok (ReconInfo { mode , model , dim , codebooks , recipe , decode , bound , }) } # [doc = " Which capability this manifest supports."] # [must_use] pub fn mode (& self) -> ReconMode { self . mode } # [doc = " The VSA model id (matches the producing `Repr.model`)."] # [must_use] pub fn model (& self) -> & str { & self . model } # [doc = " Hypervector dimensionality."] # [must_use] pub fn dim (& self) -> u32 { self . dim } # [doc = " The content-addressed codebook references."] # [must_use] pub fn codebooks (& self) -> & [ContentHash] { & self . codebooks } # [doc = " The compositional recipe, if this manifest is compositional."] # [must_use] pub fn recipe (& self) -> Option < & Recipe > { self . recipe . as_ref () } # [doc = " The decode procedure + parameters."] # [must_use] pub fn decode (& self) -> & DecodeSpec { & self . decode } # [doc = " The attached `{ε, δ, strength}` bound certificate."] # [must_use] pub fn bound (& self) -> & Bound { & self . bound } }
